meaning: adj.辅助律师业务的n.律师的专职助手,律师帮办
examples: say that I know the law. I put a lot of effort into my education as a paralegal and take it seriously.
An attorney and a paralegal in this office read every draft of every opinion in all cases prior to their release.
A: I have been working as a paralegal for the last 10 months through an agency that specializes in the legal field.
Move to Dubuque to be a paralegal at a law firm specializing in bankruptcies.
One of those in attendance at the debate was Barbara Boilston, a 49-year-old paralegal from Charleston.
